## Type of Change

- [ ] New infrastructure module
- [ ] Module update/enhancement
- [ ] Environment configuration change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] CI/CD change
- [ ] Documentation

## Environment(s) Affected

- [ ] Dev
- [ ] Staging
- [ ] Prod

## Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt` passes
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes for affected environments
- [ ] `tflint` passes with no errors
- [ ] `checkov` passes with no critical findings
- [ ] Variables have validation blocks
- [ ] Outputs are documented
- [ ] README updated (if module change)
- [ ] ADR created (if architectural decision)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
